NewStrings.LOC_SC_AHWS_NotOwned: You cannot access the saddlebags of a horse you do not own.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_AHWS_TooFar: You need to be closer to open your saddle bags.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_AHWS_NotRidden: You can only access the saddlebags of horses you own and have ridden.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_AHWS_HorseBurdened_%.0f_%.0f: Your mount is overburdened and cannot move ({Arg01}|obvArgDecimals(0)/{Arg02}|obvArgDecimals(0)).
NewStrings.LOC_SC_AHWS_PlayerUnreachable: Your mount cannot reach you here.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_AHWS_PlayerSwimming: You cannot call your mount when swimming.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_AHWS_NoMount: You do not have a mount to call.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_AHWS_StolenHorse: You cannot call a stolen mount.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_AHWS_HorseWaiting: Your mount will wait here until you call.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_AHWS_HorseFollowing: Your mount is now following you.
NewStrings.LOC_SC_HorsePCWhiteAnvilScript_MISSING: Your White horse has returned to Anvil's stables.
